name: GIGABYTE B550 AORUS ELITE AX V2 ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550 Chipset - Supports DDR4-4266(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - Intel WiFi 6 802.11ax
shortName: GIGABYTE B550 AORUS ELITE AX V2 ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD
description: High-performance ATX motherboard for AMD Ryzen with B550 chipset, PCIe 4.0, and Wi-Fi 6 connectivity.
